input.placeholder: Type a message or add claim notes…

chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your Medgulf Smart Assistant. How can I help you today?

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.

card.title: Upload Documents
card.subtitle: Upload your medical documents to start the claim process.
card.notesPlaceholder: Describe what happened or add any context…
card.hint: PDF, JPG, PNG — max 10 MB per file
card.minDocsHint: At least one Invoice and one Medical Report or Prescription required
card.dragDrop: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse

error.fileType: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are accepted.
error.minDocs: Please upload at least one Invoice and one Medical Report or Prescription.

upload.oneDocHint: Each file must contain one document only — do not combine multiple documents into a single image or scan.

quick.title: Quick Upload
quick.empty: Take a photo or browse files — they'll appear here

processing.title: Analysing your documents…
stream: Scanning the invoice for provider details…

claimant.title: Who is this claim for?
claimant.subtitle: Select the person receiving the medical service.

form.title: Review Extracted Data
form.subtitle: Please review the information extracted from your documents. Correct any errors before continuing.

fields.diagnosisPlaceholder: Type a code and press Enter…

iban.title: Payment Details
iban.subtitle: Where should we send your reimbursement?
iban.failed: IBAN verification failed. Please check the number and try again.

modal.title: Payment Details Confirmation
modal.sendingTo: Your claim reimbursement will be sent to:
modal.question: Would you like to proceed with this IBAN or update it?

error.format: IBAN must start with a 2-letter country code and contain only letters and numbers.

geo.title: Location Warning
geo.message: The provider's location may be outside your policy's covered region. Your claim will be flagged for manual review.

coverage.title: Coverage Warning
coverage.message: This service may not be covered under your current policy. Your claim will be flagged for manual review.

docUnclear.title: Document Quality Warning
docUnclear.message: One or more documents did not pass our quality check. The extracted information may be inaccurate. You can re-upload or proceed with the data shown.

warning.note: Submitting with warnings will route your claim to manual review.

financial.title: Financial Summary
financial.disclaimer: This is an estimate and not a guarantee of payment. Deductible and VAT will not be reimbursed if approved.

confirmation.title: Confirm Submission
confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to submit this claim? This action cannot be undone.

success.title: Claim Submitted
success.message: Your reimbursement request has been submitted successfully. It will be processed within the stated timeframe.
success.notification: You will receive updates in your notification centre as your claim progresses.

benefitType.title: Select Benefit Type
benefitType.subtitle: Choose the type of medical benefit for this claim.

forWhom.label: Who is this claim for?
forWhom.subtitle: Select the person who received the medical service.

statuses.submitted: Your reimbursement request has been submitted successfully. It will be processed within the stated timeframe.
statuses.under_review: Your request is currently under review. Note: deductible and VAT will not be reimbursed if approved.
statuses.additional_info: We require additional information to continue processing your request.
statuses.approved: Your reimbursement request has been approved and will be processed within the stated timeframe.
statuses.rejected: Your request has been reviewed and could not be approved.
statuses.payment_processed: Your payment has been processed successfully and transferred to your registered bank account.
